message:
fix(macros,process): generalize scope visitor to skip all nested items; add Windows wait_with_output

macros/scope.rs: Broaden visit_item_fn() override to visit_item(),
skipping all nested items (functions, impls, modules, trait impls,
etc.) rather than just fn items. Returns inside any nested item are
valid and should not be flagged as scope-body returns.

process.rs: Add Windows-specific wait_with_output_windows() that reads
stdout/stderr via blocking std::io::Read (no fd-based nonblocking I/O
on Windows) and waits for the child process. Wire both synchronous
wait_with_output() and async wait_with_output_async() to dispatch to
this method on Windows via cfg blocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
